novel_features.name: Explain Rank
novel_features.description: Top five player contributions to the current gameweek rank for a given FPL manager — synthesized from the LiveFPL per-team snapshot.

novel_features.name: Captain Ranker
novel_features.description: Ranked captain picks for the upcoming gameweek scored by ep_next × FDR × home/away × xGI/90 × minutes-risk × DGW multiplier. Add --explain for per-component breakdown. No other FPL CLI exposes a captain ranker.

novel_features.name: Chip Plan
novel_features.description: Cross-references a manager's remaining chips against detected Blank GWs / Double GWs in the remaining fixture list and surfaces concrete chip-usage windows.

novel_features.name: Player Lookup by Name
novel_features.description: Resolve any player by case-insensitive name substring against bootstrap-static (no other CLI accepts names — they all require numeric element IDs).

novel_features.name: Player Comparison
novel_features.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2+ players (price, form, points, ownership, status) in one JSON payload — directly serves the transfer-deliberation workflow.
